body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now features deep crimson scales with molten gold veins tracing the geometric blue accents, while the large wings transform into translucent ember-scaled membranes with burnt orange filaments weaving through their structure. The four legs gain a charred black texture with glowing amber cracks along the joints, and the white body base color shifts to a smoldering charcoal gray with faint smoke trails curling from each limb. The intricate purple and blue wing patterns dissolve into molten gold streaks that pulse with heat, and the red eye coloration intensifies into a glowing amber core within white pupils. The original blue geometric accents become molten gold etchings on the charred body, appearing as if carved from cooled lava.
signature_feature: Wing membranes: translucent ember-scaled membranes with burnt orange filaments weaving through their structure.
